overview: Multi-Parameter Patient Monitor with flexible Configuration and reliable Features

specs.label: ECG, Analog SpO2, NIBP, 2x TEMP, PR, RESP, Li-ion battery

features: 8 waveform display, up to 12-lead ECG analysis
Useful calculation (Hemodynamic, Drug Dose, Oxygenation, Ventilation)
Wired/Wireless CMS, support HL7 protocol to HIS
notes: Touch-Screen, 12-lead ECG, Digital or Masimo SpO2, 2/4/6 IBP, Cardiac Output, EtCO2 Analyzer, Multi-Gas Analyzer, BIS, NMT, HDMI, Thermal Recorder, Wired/Wireless CMS
